raw_consumer_statement:
I booked a vacation package from XXXX XXXX on XX/XX/XXXX that included a hotel and a rental car for my vacation from XX/XX/XXXX to XX/XX/XXXX. This vacation package included a nine-day rental of a full-sized car from XXXX. My flight was delayed and the flight number is even included on the itinerary of my XXXX XXXX vacation package. So I decided to modify only the pickup time. The rental car reservation number is XXXX. 

When I went to pick up the car, XXXX said that they couldn't find my reservation number in their system, but I had already paid for the rental car through XXXX. 

They forced me to pay for the same car again using my American Express XXXX XXXX. 

I tried to dispute this transaction with American Express, but the merchant and the bank refused to recognize that I paid for the rental car twice. American Express even alleged that the transaction dates didn't match. I planned my vacation ahead of time and paid for the vacation package on XX/XX/XXXX. The vacation package is for my vacation from XX/XX/XXXX to XX/XX/XXXX. I am attaching the full invoice and itinerary to this complaint.
